handoff.summary: Pass. All declared source byte counts and SHA-256 digests matched. The 45-line README and unchanged GIF remain clear on first read at 600 CSS pixels: modules lead to host-parallel UI/API/TEST specialists, verified fan-in, merge, memory, and the execution trace without overlap or ambiguity. The restored two-command CLI quick start remains concise and understandable.

handoff.summary: Revision 4 capability-boundary findings remain closed in Revision 5. The README restores the local validate and inspect CLI examples, preserves the in-memory no-write and no-launch specialist example boundary, assigns runtime effects to the external host, and limits core claims to compilation and approval-bound verification. Checker rules and negative fixtures anchor the restored commands, required core and host responsibility text, and forbidden runtime overclaims.
